meaning: adj.不合理的,不受良心节制的,过度的
examples: It's unconscionable for the government to do anything for a man who admits to smuggling cocaine into the United States.
To be doing that with no plan in place is just unconscionable, 'he said.
"I think it's absolutely unconscionable that the Supreme Court will not allow cameras, " he said.
This is unconscionable, it is intolerable and it is time to put an end to it.
